delivery_failed.title: Notification delivery failed
delivery_failed.description:
A notification couldn't be delivered via `{service}`: {error}.

Check that the service exists and its targets are valid (e.g. the mobile app notify service name).

template_error.title: Notification rule template error
template_error.description:
Rule **{rule}** has a template that failed to render:

```
{error}
```

Fix the template in the Notification Center panel.

no_mobile_targets.title: No mobile notify targets configured
no_mobile_targets.description:
A rule tried to send an app (mobile) notification, but no mobile notify services are configured, so the push was silently skipped.

Open **Settings → Devices & Services → Notification Center → Configure** and set **Mobile notify services** (e.g. `notify.mobile_app_yourphone`), or add presence-mapped people. Then run the `notification_center.test_push` service to verify.

action_failed.title: Notification action failed
action_failed.description:
A notification's custom action couldn't run `{service}`: {error}.

Check that the service/script exists and its name is correct (e.g. `script.reset_vacuum`). The alert was kept so you can retry.

user.title: Notification Center
user.description: Set up the Notification Center. After adding it, configure routing under Options and add notification rules from the Notifications panel in the sidebar.

abort.already_configured: Notification Center is already set up.

init.title: Notification Center options
init.description: Choose what to configure. Nothing is saved until you pick **Save & close**.

settings.title: Routing & behavior
settings.description: Pick the notify service(s) for your phone(s) below — this is what makes app notifications work. Afterwards, run the `notification_center.test_push` action to verify delivery.

data_description.mobile_targets: Your phone's notify service(s), e.g. notify.mobile_app_yourphone. Pick from the list or type one. Required for app notifications.
data_description.digest_time: When held Info digests are delivered each day.
data_description.debounce_ms: How long to coalesce a burst of entity changes before re-evaluating rules.

persons.title: Presence-mapped people

data_description.person: The person entity whose presence decides whether they're notified.
data_description.notify: The notify service for this person's phone, e.g. notify.mobile_app_alex.
data_description.media_player: Optional media player for spoken (TTS) alerts to this person.

send.name: Send notification
send.description: Create a one-off notification, routed by priority and channels.

dismiss.name: Dismiss
dismiss.description: Remove an active alert and clear its bell notification.

dismiss_item.name: Dismiss digest item
dismiss_item.description: Hide a single item within a digest alert (by its name/key).

snooze.name: Snooze
snooze.description: Dismiss an alert and suppress it for a number of minutes.

run_action.name: Run custom action
run_action.description: Run a rule-defined custom action (e.g. a reset script) and clear the alert.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Rebuild rules and listeners without restarting Home Assistant.

test_push.name: Test app notification
test_push.description: Send a test push to every configured mobile notify target to verify app notifications work.

import_rules.name: Import rules
import_rules.description: Bulk-create rule subentries from the packaged file or an inline list (idempotent).
